validation: manual fallback per HOUSECARL_SKILL_AUTHORING.md §6.5 (run_loop blocked on Windows, §6.4); manual_predicted_trigger recorded per query; flagged for empirical re-validation + peer prediction check.

should_trigger.query: I added a bound sword spell to my mod and patched its cost for Requiem, but when I cast it nothing gets summoned. What did I miss?
How do I make a custom teleport/recall spell actually teleport under Requiem Magic Redone? The damage version works but the teleport does nothing.
I want a single spell tome that teaches three spells at once, like Requiem's multi-spell tomes. How do I wire that up?
Need to register Inigo as a follower so Requiem's follower features (lockpicking, etc.) recognize him. He's already in the follower factions.
Does this new firebolt-style spell need a Papyrus script for Requiem, or will the magnitude just scale on its own?
How do I attach Nox_Conjuration_Teleport to my magic effect and set its Mark/Park properties with houseCARL?
I wrote a custom .psc for a new charm effect — how do I compile it to a pex and attach it for a Requiem patch?
My modded follower Kaidan isn't being tracked by Requiem's follower system even though he can be recruited. How do I register his alias?
What's the marker keyword or script a new mind-control / command spell needs to be picked up by Requiem's runtime?
I'm patching a control-weather spell pack for Requiem and the weather menu never shows. What script does Requiem use for that and how do I clone it?

should_not_trigger.query: Balance this modded greatsword's damage and value for Requiem's material tiers.
Set the magicka cost and magnitude of my new frost spell to match Requiem's tier-2 destruction spells.
My follower is too weak in Requiem — give her the right class, level and perks.
Add my new staff to Requiem with the right charge pool and staff keyword.
Why is my Papyrus cloak script causing stack dumps and script lag? Can you optimize it?
What does the SKSE function GetEquippedObject return and what parameters does it take?
Distribute my new enchanted dagger into Requiem's bandit loot lists so it shows up in the world.
Patch this custom race so the Reqtificator gives its NPCs the right creature traits.
Set up a SkyPatcher ini to add a keyword to all iron weapons.
My armor rating is too high after the Reqtificator — fix the cuirass for the heavy armor cap.
